meaning: adj.鏃犲彉鍖栫殑,鏈敼鍙樼殑
examples: The bank left its lending rates unchanged.
Train fares are likely to remain unchanged.
It has remained virtually unchanged since time immemorial.
It also left its key interest rate unchanged at 8% for the second month in a row.
Many companies are still top-down and hierarchical, with similarly unchanged processes and reporting lines.
